intro_1_body: Get a professional Website, Android, and iOS app for your shop in just 4 days at minimal cost.
intro_2_body: Scan barcodes to add products. If the product exists in our cloud, all details are auto-filled for you.
intro_3_body: A dedicated AI for your shop that answers customers in Marathi, Hindi, and English automatically.
intro_4_body: Join thousands of businesses. Your small investment gives your business global tech wings.
ai_trainer_desc: Add keywords to train your shop's AI assistant.
clean_data_warning: Free tier limit near! Please clean old data.
ai_brain_subtitle: Teach your bot how to talk to customers
no_knowledge: Your AI is empty. Start training now!
staff_enable_desc: Activate Biometric Attendance via USB OTG Scanner.
enroll_desc: Connect your biometric device to the mobile port.
lock_msg: System locked: Remove all employees before disabling this module.
reset_pass_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a secure recovery link.
reset_link_sent: Recovery link sent! Please check your email.
awaiting_subtitle: Our team is verifying your business details and domain request.
awaiting_desc: This process usually takes 1-2 hours. Please do not log out; we will notify you instantly once approved.
support_note: Contact us on WhatsApp if you have questions.
web_error: Could not connect to your website. Check internet.
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this knowledge?
perm_subtitle: Android often puts apps to sleep. To ensure you receive real-time updates, please enable these settings.
perm_battery_desc: Keeps the app active in the background.
perm_autostart_desc: Specific fix for your device brand.
wait_admin_msg: Our engineers are verifying your domain and requirements.
pay_advance_msg: Pay 50% advance to secure your domain and begin coding.
project_building_msg: Payment verified! Your project will be live in 4-5 days.
pay_final_msg: Your project is ready! Pay the remaining 50% to go live.
verification_msg: Always call our executive before paying for security.

select_package_err: Please select a plan to continue
select_location_err: Please select your shop on the map
upload_branding_err: Please upload both Logo and Banner to continue.
err_select_location: Please select Country, State, and City to continue.
ai_section_desc: AI gives your business tech-wings at minimal cost. Choose how you want to automate.
ai_customer_desc: A 24/7 smart chatbot on your website that guides customers, finds products, and answers queries in local languages.
ai_admin_desc: Ask your AI 'What is today's profit?' or 'Generate Excel Report'. It analyzes your data and provides instant answers.
ai_cost_note: Future technology at minimum monthly usage cost.
ai_billing_notice: AI usage is calculated monthly per query.
domain_payment_desc: To lock your business identity, please pay the full domain registration fee. Our engineers will handle the technical registration and security.
domain_authority_note: Note: Domain management and authority are handled by DigiMaharashtra to ensure 100% uptime.
verification_pending_desc: We are verifying your transaction. Once confirmed, your domain will be registered and project building will start.
counter_hint: Type the domain name and years you want...
confirm_selection_desc: Once you confirm, you will proceed to the payment screen.
call_executive_msg: For your security, please call our executive to verify bank details before paying.
pay_instruction: Minimize the app, pay using any UPI app, copy the UTR/Transaction ID, and return here.
dont_close_app: ⚠️ WARNING: Do not close or kill the app during payment.
final_dev_note: Note: Remaining development fees are payable after the project goes live.
ai_lock_msg: AI settings locked during active usage month.
tour_welcome_desc: Let's take a quick tour of your new Digital Command Center.
tour_usage_desc: These liquid jars show your Database, Media, and AI usage. As you use more, the water rises!
tour_payment_desc: See your monthly estimate here. Pay securely using our 3-step wizard.
tour_admin_desc: Launch your official website dashboard from here to add products.
ai_hint: Ask me anything about your business...
demo_ready_desc: Your official software demo is live. Please review your website and app, then proceed to the final payment to launch it to the world.
update_msg: We have added exciting new features and improved security to help your business shine in the online world.
update_steps:
Please follow these steps:
1. Logout & Uninstall this version.
2. Visit our website to download the latest {}.
3. Install and Login again to enjoy the new tech wings.
sorry_inconvenience: We apologize for this small step, but it is necessary for your business's growth.
domain_warning: Your website domain registration is expiring. Please renew now to avoid service interruption and keep your business online.
maint_safe_msg: Your Digital ID is active. Next renewal is on {}.
maint_warning_body: Your digital wings need a small recharge to keep flying globally. Please renew within {} days.
maint_overdue_body: Your maintenance is overdue. Pay now to instantly reactivate your website and apps.
pricing_disclaimer: Pricing authority lies with DigiMaharashtra. Costs may adjust based on service provider changes.
location_denied_msg: Location access is VERY IMPORTANT for DigiMaharashtra. We need this to verify your shop's physical existence and show it on the Maharashtra Shops Map. Please allow location to proceed.
mobile_wa_note: Note: Please fill both Mobile and WhatsApp fields. If they are the same, enter the same number in both.
err_mobile_wa_compulsory: Mobile and WhatsApp numbers are compulsory!
err_db_sync: Database Sync Error: Please contact support.
err_shop_conn: Shop connection failed. Please log in.
err_gps_off: Please turn on your Phone's GPS
loc_steps_instruction: Follow 2 steps: Select your city, then pin your shop location on the map. If City or Country list is not working, please restart the app.
loc_presence_note: Note: This exact location will be used for your shop's official digital presence.
describe_vision_hint: Tell us about any specific feature or unique idea you want...
non_refundable_note: Note: Setup and domain registration fees are strictly non-refundable once payment is initiated.
play_policy_maint_disclaimer: This transaction is for external server maintenance, Cloudflare R2 hosting, and web service operations. This is not an in-app digital purchase.
play_policy_dev_disclaimer: This transaction covers third-party domain registration fees and customized web software deployment. All services are rendered outside of this mobile application.
auto_debit_desc: Configure automatic monthly payment for your external website servers and dynamic cloud infrastructure.
